title: poa hirtiglumis
intro: Poa hirtiglumis, also known as hairy leaved meadow grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Poa hirtiglumis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Poa hirtiglumis can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
